enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his Saturday-into-Sunday, having worked until 6am on his Rome tracing/mapping project. He recaps helping his mom with errands, smoking a joint his roommate left him, listening to a history of England podcast, and scaling back his Rome ambitions so he can finish it sooner.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: scaling back to just building outlines so he can actually finish it

stances.topic: finishing projects before starting new ones
stances.position: always tells himself this but ends up starting new projects anyway — self-aware about the pattern

transcript.text: Oh, hi, living in Boulder B-Log. It's six o'clock in the evening on Sunday, but this is going to be the one for Saturday.
Yesterday I worked. That would have been Saturday. I worked until six o'clock in the morning Sunday on Rome.
Tracing Rome keeps, no matter how many buildings you do, I've noticed after the last few weeks, there's always more buildings.
I guess that's what, that's what it's like with cities. So that's what I, I did a little bit of that today, but not really.
I'm just getting started, even though it's six, because I got up at like noon and then I, I had to go to my mom's house.
I was having trouble getting up because it was so cold. Got up at like noon or one, but got up, drove over there and helped her out with some stuff,
Organized and clean the house and stuff. You know, we did an errand. Um, and, um, came back here and just been working.
Um, so, uh, my roommate gave me a joint this morning. I got up and there was a joint there that I smoked. That was pretty cool.
Um, so, uh, listening to the, uh, audio, the, uh, history of, uh, England podcast.
I got another, I got another YouTube request to do a video about England.
Interesting courts at Pints of England. So I'll do my enlightenment video. That's a request. I'll do that like tomorrow, but not today.
Uh, yeah. Today's Saturday, Sunday. Well, I'll just work. Oh, I have to get up early tomorrow.
I have to take my mom to the, uh, her surgery at 9.15 tomorrow morning, 9.30. So, but I think I'll get to, I'll work all night anyway.
Um, cause she'll just call me and wake me up. But, uh, hopefully I don't have to have a shower at the clubhouse.
Hopefully they fix the pipes, but if not, I'll go to the clubhouse, but I think I lost the cove to get it for my rent.
But, um, uh, uh, yeah. Yeah. So, um, I decided to not be quite so ambitious with my, uh, realm.
I was going to build all the city, the buildings exactly throughout the entire, within the confines of the railing wall.
But instead of doing that, I'm just going to put the buildings, the outlines of the buildings still need to do.
But so I'll get done. I might be able to get done with the whole thing by at least this winter.
But that's so funny. Cause I remember like a year ago, I was working on Google everything Boulder and I was telling myself,
Oh yeah, this is the last project I'm going to do. I mean, I'm not going to do anything else until I finish this.
And then I started like two others after that. So, but that's how I feel about this one.
This is the last project. I'm not going to start anything or get going on anything until I'm done with this.
So we'll see. Yeah. Cause Rome is just fascinating. Um, I can't wait.
I can't wait to see and to make all the movies moving around it and everything.
It's going to be so cool. But anyways, I, uh, I think I'll cut it, cut it for now.
Oh, my God.
Oh, my God.
Thank you.
